text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is here. Seiun Sky has
made up her mind to participate, revealing she
has a plan to break down the wall she's stuck
behind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When facing opponents who have already
overcome their own limits, all she can do is the
same, saying, "I have to overcome my limits and
run away!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to smash down the wall between her and
victory by pushing past her limits and maintaining
top speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When facing opponents who have already
overcome their own limits, all she can do is "pull
ahead at the last possible second."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to smash down the wall between her and
victory by conjuring a second wind at full speed in
the final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When facing opponents who have already
overcome their own limits, all she can do is "tear
ahead at the hill."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to smash down the wall between her and
victory through persistence and turning her
perceived weakness into strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When facing opponents who have already
overcome their own limits, all she can do is "pass
'em right back" the moment she's lost the lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to smash down the wall between her and
victory through stubborn willpower, even if she
lacks talent and strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When facing opponents who have already
overcome their own limits, all she can do is "aim
for the best racer."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to smash down the wall between her and
victory by toying with her target and breaking
their momentum.
